rootCause: HEPA filter replacement interval did not reflect updated environmental trend limits.
correctiveAction: Replaced HEPA filter, requalified the suite, and reviewed affected batch exposure windows.

rootCause: Preventive maintenance reminder was manually tracked and missed during holiday coverage.
correctiveAction: Added automated maintenance reminders and department-level escalation.

rootCause: Second-person verification ownership was unclear during shift handover.
correctiveAction: Revised handover checklist and retrained operators and supervisors.

rootCause: Visual inspection rejection trend was not escalated after borderline observations.
correctiveAction: Reviewed retained samples and strengthened inspection reconciliation review.

rootCause: Engineering review did not trend repeat HEPA pressure drift across adjacent areas.
correctiveAction: Updated trend review scope and replaced affected gasket assembly.
